name: UPU Constitution 1964 (Universal Postal Union)
summary: The Universal Postal Union (UPU) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-UPU-treaty framework adopted by the UPU Congress in Vienna — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-postal-services framework + second-oldest international organization globally after ITU framework (UPU Constitution adopted 10 July 1964 in Vienna Austria + effective 1 January 1966 + General Postal Union founded 9 October 1874 in Bern Switzerland by Treaty of Bern + renamed Universal Postal Union 1878 + UN specialized agency from 1 July 1948 framework — formal foundational UPU treaty framework establishing comprehensive UPU organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-postal-services framework + second-oldest international organization globally after ITU framework via 9 October 1874 founding + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Single Postal Territory framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Terminal Dues framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-administration-Universal-Postal-Union-withdrawal-threat 2018-2019 framework via US announcement October 2018 + Extraordinary Congress September 2019 + US negotiated framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal World Post Day 9 October framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Quadrennial Congress framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal 1969 Tokyo + 1989 Washington + 1999 Beijing + 2008 Geneva + 2016 Istanbul + 2021 Abidjan + 2025 Dubai framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal e-commerce + postal-digitalization 2030 framework). The UPU Constitution is binding upon 192 UPU member states as of 2026 — substantial universal coverage framework with non-members North Korea + Taiwan + 2-3 micro-states framework. The Constitution is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal UPU cross-border-postal-services framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-correspondence-with-children-of-separated-parents framework. The UPU Congress + UPU Council of Administration + UPU Postal Operations Council + UPU International Bureau + UPU Director General are the formal UPU bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The UPU Constitution is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: UPU Constitution
statutory_framework.relevance: UPU Constitution adopted 10 July 1964 in Vienna Austria + effective 1 January 1966 + Universal Postal Convention + General Regulations framework — formal foundational UPU treaty framework establishing comprehensive UPU organisation framework.

statutory_framework.citation: Treaty of Bern 1874 (General Postal Union Founding)
statutory_framework.title: Treaty of Bern
statutory_framework.relevance: Treaty of Bern signed 9 October 1874 in Bern Switzerland founding General Postal Union + effective 1 July 1875 — predecessor framework to UPU + second-oldest international organization globally after ITU.

statutory_framework.title: UPU UN Specialized Agency Status
statutory_framework.relevance: UPU became UN specialized agency 1 July 1948 — formal UPU UN specialized agency framework.

statutory_framework.citation: UPU 2019 Extraordinary Congress Terminal Dues Reform
statutory_framework.title: UPU 2019 Extraordinary Congress
statutory_framework.relevance: UPU Extraordinary Congress held 24-26 September 2019 in Geneva Switzerland + Terminal Dues Reform framework resolving US withdrawal-threat — formal UPU Terminal Dues Reform + US-retention framework.

apex_courts.name: UPU Congress
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for UPU — held quadrennially.

apex_courts.name: UPU Council of Administration
apex_courts.role: Formal executive body for UPU between Congresses.

apex_courts.name: UPU Postal Operations Council
apex_courts.role: Formal UPU technical body for postal operations.

apex_courts.name: UPU Director General
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for UPU — currently Masahiko Metoki Japan 2022-2025 + 2025+ next Director General framework.

anonymisation_convention: UPU-related communications operate via state-state framework via UPU Congress + Council of Administration; individual communications not formally accepted under UPU framework.

key_developments.title: General Postal Union founded
key_developments.description: General Postal Union founded 9 October 1874 in Bern Switzerland by Treaty of Bern + 22 founding states — predecessor framework to UPU.

key_developments.title: UPU renamed Universal Postal Union
key_developments.description: General Postal Union renamed Universal Postal Union 1878 by Paris Congress — formal UPU renaming framework operational.

key_developments.title: UPU becomes UN specialized agency
key_developments.description: UPU became UN specialized agency 1 July 1948 — formal UPU UN specialized agency framework operational.

key_developments.title: UPU Constitution adopted
key_developments.description: UPU Constitution adopted 10 July 1964 in Vienna Austria at Vienna Congress — formal foundational UPU Constitution framework adopted.

key_developments.title: UPU Constitution enters force
key_developments.description: UPU Constitution entered force 1 January 1966 — formal foundational UPU Constitution framework operational.

key_developments.title: Tokyo Congress + 16th UPU Congress
key_developments.description: 16th UPU Congress held 14 October - 14 November 1969 in Tokyo Japan — formal Tokyo Congress framework operational.

key_developments.title: Washington DC Congress + 20th UPU Congress
key_developments.description: 20th UPU Congress held 13 November - 14 December 1989 in Washington DC USA — formal Washington Congress framework operational.

key_developments.title: Beijing Congress + 22nd UPU Congress
key_developments.description: 22nd UPU Congress held 23 August - 15 September 1999 in Beijing China — formal Beijing Congress framework operational.

key_developments.title: Trump-administration-UPU withdrawal threat
key_developments.description: Trump-administration-UPU withdrawal threat announcement October 2018 over Terminal Dues + China-postal-rates framework — formal Trump-UPU-withdrawal-threat framework operational.

key_developments.title: UPU Extraordinary Congress + Terminal Dues Reform + US retention
key_developments.description: UPU Extraordinary Congress held 24-26 September 2019 in Geneva Switzerland + Terminal Dues Reform resolving US withdrawal-threat + US negotiated framework — formal UPU Terminal Dues Reform + US-retention framework operational.

key_developments.title: Abidjan Congress + 27th UPU Congress
key_developments.description: 27th UPU Congress held 9-27 August 2021 in Abidjan Côte d'Ivoire + Masahiko Metoki Japan elected UPU Director General — formal Abidjan Congress framework operational.

key_developments.title: Dubai Congress + 28th UPU Congress + UN80
key_developments.description: 28th UPU Congress held 2025 in Dubai UAE + UN80 Reform Process 2025-2026 framework — formal Dubai Congress + UN80 framework operational.

structural_findings: UPU Constitution operates a supranational global binding-treaty framework — places UPU Constitution in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-postal-services framework + second-oldest international organization globally after ITU framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-postal-services framework + second-oldest international organization globally after ITU framework via 9 October 1874 founding + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Single Postal Territory framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Terminal Dues framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-administration-Universal-Postal-Union-withdrawal-threat 2018-2019 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal World Post Day 9 October framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Quadrennial Congress framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal e-commerce + postal-digitalization 2030 framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal UPU Single Postal Territory framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Single Postal Territory framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal UPU Terminal Dues framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Terminal Dues framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal 2019 Terminal Dues Reform framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Trump-administration-UPU-withdrawal-threat 2018-2019 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-withdrawal-threat-then-retained framework.
192 UPU member state ratification framework with non-members North Korea + Taiwan + 2-3 micro-states is structurally distinctive globally — substantial universal coverage framework.

1874 General Postal Union + 1878 UPU + 1948 UN specialized agency + 1964 UPU Constitution + 1966 entry into force + 1969 Tokyo Congress + 1989 Washington Congress + 1999 Beijing Congress + 2018 Trump-withdrawal-threat + 2019 Extraordinary Congress + Terminal Dues Reform + 2021 Abidjan Congress + 2025 Dubai Congress + UN80 UPU-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

UPU Constitution + Treaty of Bern + Single Postal Territory + Terminal Dues + UPU Congress + Council of Administration formal sextet framework with limited PA-intersection framework via formal cross-border-correspondence-with-children-of-separated-parents framework.

Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-postal-services framework + second-oldest international organization globally after ITU via 9 October 1874 founding + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Single Postal Territory + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Terminal Dues + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-withdrawal-threat-then-retained-via-Terminal-Dues-Reform-2019 + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal World Post Day 9 October + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Quadrennial Congress + central jurisdiction of formal Single Postal Territory + central jurisdiction of formal Terminal Dues + central jurisdiction of formal Trump-administration-UPU-withdrawal-threat + 192 UPU member states + UPU Headquartered Bern + UPU Director General Masahiko Metoki Japan 2022-2025 + 1874 General Postal Union + 1878 UPU + 1948 UN specialized agency + 1964 UPU Constitution + 1966 entry into force + 1969 Tokyo + 1989 Washington + 1999 Beijing + 2018 Trump-withdrawal-threat + 2019 Extraordinary Congress + Terminal Dues Reform + US-retention + 2021 Abidjan + Masahiko Metoki + 2025 Dubai + UN80 UPU-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: UPU cross-border-postal-services framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-correspondence-with-children-of-separated-parents framework.
